chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1207 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 5053/2023 3.For hearing of main case 20-09-2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w ASI/I.O Abdul Karim Khaskheli of P.S Bozdar Wada. ***** Mrs. Farzana (Bhatti) Makwal, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.4. This petition has been filed by petitioner for quashment of FIR No.35 of 2023, registered at P.S, Bozdar Wada for offences under Sections 336-B, 511, 114 & 34 PPC. I.O is present and submits that after investigation, he has cancelled the said FIR, as this incident had not happened and has submitted such report before the Magistrate concerned, which is pending there for orders. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition already having served its purpose is disposed of. However, petitioner would be entitled to challenge the order to be passed by the Magistrate, if aggrieved by it, in any manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
